branch_not_found_in_tenant: Branch not found for this tenant
insufficient_module_access: You do not have access to this module
unauthorized_resource_access: You are not authorized to access this resource
cash_account_not_found_or_inactive: Cash account not found or inactive
cash_account_type_invalid: cash_account_id must be a cash type account
account_type_not_cash: account_id must not be a cash type account (use bank/e-wallet/pulsa/other)
account_create_branch_invalid: Account can only be created for your active branch
account_update_branch_invalid: Account cannot be moved to another branch
account_source_dest_same: Source and destination accounts must not be the same
account_source_dest_same_tx: Cash account and bank/e-wallet account must not be the same
transfer_dest_not_allowed: destinationAccountId is only allowed for transfer action
insufficient_balance_transfer: Insufficient balance for transfer + admin fee
insufficient_balance_named: Balance of {accountName} is insufficient for this transaction
set_saldo_same_value: Target balance is the same as current balance
change_password_no_password_set: This account does not have a password yet
change_password_same_as_old: New password must not be the same as old password
export_end_before_start: end_date must be greater than start_date
dashboard_end_before_start: end_date must be greater than start_date
phone_already_in_use: Phone number is already in use
invalid_credentials: Invalid email, phone number, or password
branch_not_found_or_outside_tenant: Branch not found or not part of your tenant.
branch_not_in_delegation: This branch is not in your delegation. Ask admin to add delegation to this branch.
delegation_role_invalid: Delegation role is invalid for your tenant.
user_outside_tenant_scope: Account is not in the same tenant as the login context.
branch_outside_tenant_scope: Branch must be in the same tenant as your account.
please_verify_email_to_continue: Please verify your email to continue
role_minimum_one: There must be at least one role.
product_sku_already_exists: A product with this SKU already exists
product_not_found_or_no_access: Product not found or you do not have access to this product.
category_name_already_exists: A category with this name already exists
user_email_already_exists: A user with this email is already registered
user_minimum_one: There must be at least one user.
user_cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
branch_minimum_one: There must be at least one branch.
user_already_delegated_to_branch: User is already delegated to this branch
admin_email_already_exists: An admin with this email is already registered
pos_account_not_found_in_branch: Account not found in this branch
pos_payment_method_cash_requires_cash_ac: Cash payment method requires a cash type account
pos_products_not_found_in_branch: Products not found in this branch: {ids}
pos_stock_insufficient_named: Stock for "{name}" is insufficient: available {available}, requested {requested}
pos_order_void_requires_completed: Only completed orders can be voided
pos_cash_account_for_order_not_found: Destination account for order not found
pos_product_not_found_in_branch: Product not found in this branch
pos_stock_movement_insufficient_named: Stock of "{name}" is insufficient: available {available}, requested {requested}
pos_trial_daily_limit_reached: Trial period has reached the maximum of {limit} physical transactions per day. Upgrade your plan for more transactions.
subscription_expired: Your subscription has expired. Please renew to continue transacting.
stock_adjust_cost_invalid: Stock addition cost must be greater than 0 if cash account is selected.
billing_pending_exists: There are pending bills. Pay or cancel them before purchasing a new plan.
subscription_max_two_years: Cannot extend beyond 2 years. Complete the current period first.
tenant_owner_only_billing: Only the tenant owner can make subscription payments
tenant_owner_only_cancel_subscription: Only the tenant owner can cancel subscriptions
subscription_cancel_pending_only: Only subscriptions with pending status can be cancelled
tenant_owner_only_addon_purchase: Only the tenant owner can purchase add-ons
addon_requires_active_subscription: No active subscription plan. Add-ons can only be purchased with an active plan.
addon_not_during_trial: Add-ons are not available during trial. Upgrade your plan first.
addon_pricing_unavailable: Pricing configuration for active plan is not available
addon_price_not_configured: Add-on price has not been configured
tenant_owner_only_addon_cancel: Only the tenant owner can cancel add-ons
addon_cancel_pending_only: Only add-ons with pending status can be cancelled
payment_attempt_not_for_addon: Payment attempt is not for an add-on
passwords_do_not_match: Password and confirm password do not match
email_domain_not_allowed: Only major email domains are allowed
